Package jsim.api

Class GamePieceState

java.lang.Object
jsim.api.GamePieceState
Direct Known Subclasses:
Coral2025, Fuel2026
public class GamePieceState extends Object
Tracks the lifecycle and data of a standard game piece in the simulation.

    Enum representing the lifecycle state of a game piece.

    • GamePieceState

      public GamePieceState(GamePiecePhysics physicsType)
      Creates a new GamePieceState with the specified physics type.
      Parameters:
      physicsType - The physics properties for this game piece.

  • Method Details

    • intakeZone

      public void intakeZone(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation3d[] intakeArea)
      Defines valid interaction volume for intake.
      Parameters:
      intakeArea - Array of Translation3d vertices defining the intake polygon in 3D space.

    • spawn

      public static FieldState<GamePieceState> spawn(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation3d exitAngle, edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation3d exitVelocity, edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation2d robotOffsetStart)
      Ejects/spawns a piece based on parameters mapping.
      Parameters:
      exitAngle - The rotation angle for the game piece exit.
      exitVelocity - The 3D velocity vector for the game piece exit.
      robotOffsetStart - The 2D offset from the robot start position.
      Returns:
      A FieldState wrapper containing the spawned GamePieceState.
